name: linacre.site
description: Personal developer portfolio and free-tools directory built with React, TypeScript, and Vite, with an Express/Gemini-powered AI chat playground.

name: KushCloud
description: KushCloud 🌿 — A chill one-tap arcade flyer. Flappy Bird-style game with synthesised audio, unlockable cosmetics & power-ups. Built with React, TypeScript & Vite.

name: PokeGuru
description: Pokemon TCG card database with search, pricing, and set browsing

name: myhub-pipeline
description: 49-block automated DevOps pipeline: CI/CD, AI auto-fix, DORA metrics, security scanning, anomaly detection & predictive failure. Portfolio project by David Linacre.

name: Linacre-LLM-Benchmarks
description: 🌐 Automated 24h LLM Benchmark Dashboard scraping the most accurate sources across the web.

name: LinacreUninstaller
description: 🗑️ Android master uninstaller & debloat tool. Clean UI, safe tiers, and powerful batching.

name: dkma-monster
description: Universal Dont-Kill-My-App toolkit — stop aggressive OEM battery managers from killing your Android apps. CLI, GUI, web guide, root/Magisk, Android + KMP libraries.

name: ev-bot-companion
description: Android/web companion app for EV-Bot — a Gemini-powered AI avatar linking Alexa voice commands to desktop PC macros, with offline-first sync.

name: ev-backend
description: FastAPI backend service powering an Alexa voice assistant integration.

name: smart-mail
description: AI-powered unified inbox (Google Gemini) — smart categorisation, importance detection & multi-account. React + TypeScript + Capacitor.
